GLOSSARY AND ABBREVIATIONS 
 
 
MFC Monitoring and Forecasting Centre 
SI Sea Ice  
NetCDF Network Common Data Form 
CF Climate Forecast (convention for NetCDF) 
CIS  Central Information System 
DU  
Dissemination Unit. A Dissemination Unit is a kind of 
Production Unit, with the ability to disseminate its own 
products or other Production Unit's products to the rest of 
CMEMS Production Centres and to external Users. 
DT Delayed Time 
EC European Commission 
ECMWF European Centre for Medium Range Weather Forecast 
SAR Synthetic Aperture Radar 
SIC Sea Ice Concentration 
SIT Sea Ice Thickness 
SIType  Sea Ice Type (first-year / multi-year sea ice) 
TAC Thematic Assembly Centre 
SIT Sea Ice Thickness 
NetCDF Network Common Data Form
